title: Yoda's kybuck

{{Quote|Go now. No longer safe for you, it is.|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|<ref name="CW25">{{CW|25}}</ref>}}
A male '''kybuck''' was owned by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was employed during the earliest and last days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==

===Early Life===
[[File:Menagerie.png|thumb|250x250px|Yoda's kybuck was kept in a menagerie in the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].]]
Native from<ref name=":0" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="db">{{DB|location|kashyyyk|Kashyyyk}}</ref> of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], a male neutered [[Kybuck/Legends|kybuck]] was given to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] by a [[Woolwarricca]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] for his role in healing her.<ref name=":0">{{DB|creature|kybuck|kybuck}}</ref> It was actually the last of a long series of kybucks owned by the Jedi Master, which had consisted of over thirty three.<ref name="The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force real-life book">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>

When Yoda returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he brought this kybuck with him and kept it<ref name=":0" /> in an [[Kybuck menagerie|expansive garden]]<ref name="The Clone Wars: Deadly Hands of Shon-Ju">''[[The Clone Wars: Deadly Hands of Shon-Ju]]''</ref> beneath the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Yoda took great care of the animal, but never assumed the role of its master and owner,<ref name=":0" /> as it was frowned upon for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to take possessions,<ref name="Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones">{{Film|II}}</ref> and instead became a friend to the creature. He called to it through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] rather than by name, as he believed it did not need one.<ref name=":0" />

Although not normally used as mounts, Yoda's slight size allowed him to ride the beast.<ref name=":0" /> The kybuck only wore a light [[Saddle/Legends|saddle]], as well as protective visors for combat.<ref name="Chapter 1" /> 

===Action in the Clone Wars===
[[File:Kybuckcharge_cw1.jpg|thumb|left|250x250px|Yoda rides his kybuck into battle.]]Yoda rode his kybuck many times during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], including on an [[Battle of unidentified planet (Yoda's charge)|unidentified planet]]<ref name="Chapter 1">{{CW|1}}</ref> and even for some period of time during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]]. Even though the kybuck was brave enough to stand before the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]],<ref name="Chapter 23 Star Wars: Clone Wars">{{CW|23}}</ref> he but kept the creature safely away from any danger.<ref name="action figure">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|pack=#32: Yoda & Kybuck (Jedi Master)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TAC32yodakybuck.asp}}</ref> Eventually Yoda was too concerned for his friend and sent him away<ref name="Chapter 25 Star Wars: Clone Wars">{{CW|25}}</ref> from the thickest of the fighting.<ref name=":0" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="death">[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]'s kybuck is seen alive during the events of "[[Chapter 25 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 25]]", which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. [[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side|''Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side'']] reveals that the kybuck died before Yoda went in exile on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], which [[The New Essential Chronology|''The New Essential Chronology'']] also places in 19 BBY. As result such year must be the date of the kybuck's death.</ref> at some point after the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] and before the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]],<ref name="Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith">{{Film|III}}</ref> Yoda's kybuck was killed on a patrol of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] world of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] by wild [[Tuk'ata/Legends|Tuk'atas]]. He did not chose another mount, leaving his [[Heart/Legends|heart]] heavy.<ref name="BOS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

===Legacy===
While being lost on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]],<ref name="BOS" /> to the public it was not known what happened to the kybuck after the fire at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] the night of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].<ref name=":0" />

In [[43 ABY]],<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> while viewing a pen of kybucks at the [[Coruscant Livestock Exchange and Exhibition]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] recounted that Master [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] had ridden a kybuck on occasion during the final days of the Clone Wars.<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Omen">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]''</ref>
